{{Infobox character
| name = Frozen Blade
| aliases = Sage of the Frozen Blade
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Sage of the Frozen Blade, Winter Sage
| abilities = Frozen Blade
| affiliations = Akura clan, Frozen Blade school
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

''See also: [[Frozen Blade Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Frozen Blade school]] is a powerful sect headquartered in a snowy region, characterized by its vast territory and the protection it provides to an entire nation against environmental threats and invaders. The sect's domain is filled with jagged, razor-sharp ice blades that possess [[sword aura]], and its environment is so harsh that only Truegolds on the [[Path of the Frozen Blade]] can safely visit. The school's presence is marked by massive structures, such as a tower-sized [[sword]] of [[madra]]. The sect is led by the [[Winter Sage]], also known as [[Min Shuei]] or the [[Sage]] of the Frozen Blade. She is a woman with long white hair and tanned skin who possesses a [[sword]] identical to one she crafted herself. As one of three [[Sages]] of her generation to manifest the [[Sword Icon]], she is a formidable combatant capable of utilizing specialized techniques like the Frozen Blade technique, which can freeze an area and suspend snowflakes as nexuses of [[sword madra]]. Her combat style involves both physical strikes and mental or spiritual attacks, such as the [[Nightmare Grasp]]. The school's members include specialized teams, such as Underladies who wear sky-blue robes and utilize icy blades extending from their forearms.}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The Frozen Blade is a vassal faction under the [[Akura clan]], whose students are currently ranked in the thirties. During their time in the [[arena]], members of the team utilize constructs capable of detecting [[Lindon]]'s specific [[construct]] signature. Although [[Yerin]] is familiar with the [[Winter Sage]], also known as the [[Sage]] of the Frozen Blade, only one competitor from this school successfully advanced past the second round. The team is currently expected to be retrieved in approximately eight months.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Frozen Blade team]] is expected to be retrieved in approximately eight months.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Frozen Blade school]] is a vassal faction under the [[Akura clan]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Sage]] of the [[Frozen Blade]] is a known figure to [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Sage]] of the [[Frozen Blade]] has a [[sword]] against the wall.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Sage]] of the [[Frozen Blade]] is also referred to as the [[Winter Sage]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Frozen Blade]] students are ranked in the thirties.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12">''Uncrowned'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Frozen Blade team]] has constructs that can detect [[Lindon's construct]] signature.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Only one competitor from the [[Frozen Blade]] made it out of the second round.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Frozen Blade]] students are in the [[arena]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Frozen Blade]] sect/group will get [[Yerin]] to [[Overlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Frozen Blade]] women are part of the group.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Frozen Blade]] is a technique that uses shards of [[Frozen Blade madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] activated the [[Frozen Blade madra]] technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Frozen Blade madra]] left a tower-sized [[sword]] in the ground.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4">''Bloodline'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Sage]] of the [[Frozen Blade]] gave [[Yerin]] a basic language [[construct]] during the [[Uncrowned]] [[King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9">''Dreadgod'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Silent King]] was reinforcing his technique on the [[Sage]] of the [[Frozen Blade]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Min Shuei]] is the [[Sage]] of the [[Frozen Blade]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sage]] of the [[Frozen Blade]] has a sect.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Frozen Blade will get Yerin to Overlord,” Cladia said, reclining in a plush chair.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“Surely the Sage of the Frozen Blade wouldn’t leave her sect behind,” Eithan said, as though reading from a script.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
